file: 1430_Wulandari 等 - 2024 - Hydroisomerization of n-dodecane over zeolite socony mobile-48-γ-Al2O3 supported platinum catalyst.txt

experiments.description: 在固定床反应器中，使用不同铂浓度（0.1, 0.3, 0.5 wt%）的Pt/ZSM-48-γ-Al2O3催化剂，在不同反应温度（275°C, 300°C, 325°C）下对正十二烷进行加氢异构化反应。反应条件为：LHSV 1 h⁻¹，氢气压力25 bar，氢气流量200 mL/min。产物使用GC-SIMDIS分析转化率和选择性，并测定倾点。
experiments.text_snippet: The performance of the three catalyst variations was then tested in a fixed-bed reactor by varying the reaction temperatures of 275 °C, 300 °C, and 325 °C... Operating conditions regulated via a computer connected to the reactor include Liquid Hourly Space Velocity (LHSV) 1 h⁻¹, hydrogen pressure 25 bar, and H2 gas rate 200 mL/minute with reaction temperature variations of 275 °C, 300 °C, and 325 °C.

Conversion rate.original: Varies with Pt concentration and temperature: 7.05% to 92.25%

Product Selectivity.original: Highest selectivity: 90.70% for 0.3 wt% Pt at 300°C
